LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS STEPHEN RUBEN, THE RUBEN LAW FIRM'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY ACTION. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION GRANTED. THE CASE IS STAYED PENDING ARBITRATION. DISCOVERY SHALL BE PERMITTED IN THE ARBITRATION PROCEEDING ACCORDING TO THE CA DISCOVERY ACT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

Notice Of Hearing On And Petition For Appointment Of Arbitrator
Off Calendar Dec-20-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Michael C. Miller, Esq., Law Offices, 650-323-2003, for Plaintiff and moving party

No other Appearance. Tentative Ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF SARA SELTZER's Petition For Appointment Of Arbitrator is Granted. The parties agree and the Court appoints Michael G. Ornstill as arbitrator. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla Miller, Court Reporter: Teanna Ward, CSR #11918

Mtn To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action; Req For Judicial Notice; Pos
Off Calendar Jan-13-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS STEPHEN RUBEN, THE RUBEN LAW FIRM'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY ACTION. Appearances: Stephen M. Lawniczak of Gordon & Rees LLP for defendants and moving parties. No other appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to compel arbitration granted. The case is stayed pending arbitration. Discovery shall be permitted in the arbitration proceeding according to the CA Discovery Act. Order signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
